title: brassica napus var. glauca
intro: Brassica napus var. glauca, also known as winter rape or brown mustard, is a plant belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It is used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate digestion and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Brassica napus var. glauca include its potential to support liver and kidney function, as well as its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of Brassica napus var. glauca include infusions, tinctures, and poultices, which can be used to treat various health issues.
